---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Deadlocked Amidst NEET Protests and Legislative Business"
date: 2026-07-22T15:56:28.099107+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces repeated adjournments as the Opposition protests the NEET issue, while the government moves to introduce the Supreme Court Judges Amendment..."
run_time_ist: "9:26PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:26PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> Both houses of Parliament faced repeated adjournments as Opposition leaders, including those wearing black in protest, demanded discussions on the NEET paper leak and police action against students.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxPdG8xZGJpd09MVG03bHVGbngwXzBnUGZ5em9JT2x0WlJOd09IekVUcDBQLW5kUlE4X0ZVbkRMYlVmMXdPbU5YNTJFSVNzWDN3cG5UYTVJN1pZcmlCSEtaOC1VNW1fQ1Q2U2tZWnJxbnRnQkw0NWFFR3Y5ZEQ1djBUVmZRSmMzV19PMHA1MTlEVlVSanc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxNXzVqSm5iZmEyLVFDTnpxSFkyR1IzdWdFLVVveGR1TVBLc21FZWhTM2dJRXBtUWhfUTUtLVRxMzZtMXh2RFRmU00zM1VaMlk4XzZkcENkSTItbVJ4YnJGYW5zeWFTYm02X2w1M3d1RDltLXhRZU1tQWJSSWE2d2F2OEpKZG5XbzV1SzZSVGkwM1k1YjI0a3k3SnJLeG9obnB2a01QdDQtUGdvV0wzVVNia01R?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative agenda:</strong> Amidst the ongoing political standoff, the Lok Sabha is set to introduce the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill, 2026.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxNRGZaRlJ2UXJkWDZuQld3RGpiaVlNcjVTbDRibVhBS01uVXNwV3JmSzBFcERxQWsxbHJSR1dLUXNQOFVRNlBFTGJ3TWhEZ2JCTl9ON1gwTE5DWkIxSUhZOVFDZWFFUS1peFFSc2N0STRsb0FyV2txSHJrWXpMcGxHV3REdmVhLTdhSkZRN1N1Q0F1MVNqNGhFUDhVbFVwX3pJTjhVT09hZUcyMVhaZTlPRjdNSWlTc2gxRGRsekZWSS1VNXRLaFNGUlBRZw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I32</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Disciplinary action:</strong> TMC MP Kalyan Banerjee was suspended from the Lok Sabha following allegations of using unparliamentary language against women MPs.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Judicial oversight:</strong> The Supreme Court has issued notice to the Lok Sabha Speaker regarding the merger of UBT MPs with the Eknath Shinde-led Shiv Sena and is reviewing a plea concerning an alternate namaz site near the Bhojshala complex.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google._?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election integrity:</strong> A national round table conference of the ECI and State Election Commissioners concluded in New Delhi, while a Bihar BJP delegation formally complained to the ECI regarding campaign expenditures in the Bankipur byelection.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
</ul>

</details>
</article>
